# HydroBlaze Media

> Performance-driven digital marketing agency in Bangalore, India helping ambitious brands generate leads, grow revenue, and scale with strategy-first creative.

HydroBlaze Media is a full-service digital marketing agency specializing in
performance marketing, social media management, content production, branding,
website development, and lead generation. We combine analytical strategy
("Hydro") with creative execution ("Blaze") to deliver campaigns that move
revenue — not vanity metrics.

- Canonical domain: https://hydroblazemedia.com
- Contact: hello@hydroblazemedia.com
- Location: Bangalore, Karnataka, India
- Service areas: India and worldwide (remote)
- Business hours: Monday–Saturday, 10:00–19:00 IST

## Services
- [Social Media Marketing](https://hydroblazemedia.com/services): Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube management and content calendars.
- [Performance Marketing](https://hydroblazemedia.com/services): Meta Ads and Google Ads campaigns engineered for ROAS and lead volume.
- [Content Production](https://hydroblazemedia.com/services): Photo, video, reels, and ad creative built to convert.
- [Branding & Creative](https://hydroblazemedia.com/services): Logo, identity systems, and brand guidelines.
- [Website Development](https://hydroblazemedia.com/services): High-performance marketing sites and landing pages.
- [Lead Generation](https://hydroblazemedia.com/services): Funnels, CRM integration, and qualified pipeline for sales teams.

## Pages
- [Home](https://hydroblazemedia.com/): Overview of services, results, and process.
- [Services](https://hydroblazemedia.com/services): Full service catalog and pricing tiers.
- [Portfolio](https://hydroblazemedia.com/portfolio): Case studies including CultFit Rajajinagar, BLR Kabab, Aayara, Aqua Splash, and AMSC.
- [About](https://hydroblazemedia.com/about): Company story, values, and methodology.
- [Blog](https://hydroblazemedia.com/blog): Insights on digital marketing, Meta Ads, Google Ads, SEO, and growth.
- [Privacy Policy](https://hydroblazemedia.com/privacy-policy): Data and privacy commitments.

## Primary keywords

Meta Ads, Google Ads, branding agency, website development, lead generation,
digital marketing Bangalore, marketing agency Bangalore.
